description: Audio asset manifest for the Stormy Night lighting palette. All sounds sourced from Freesound.org under CC licenses. Intended for UE5 MetaSounds integration by Agent #16 (Audio Agent).

primary_ambience.name: Thunder and rain during the night in the Amazonian Rainforest

ue5_usage.notes: Non-spatial global ambience — plays at full volume regardless of player position. Loop seamlessly for sustained storm.
Trigger on lightning flash visual event. Randomize delay 0-2500ms to simulate distance variation. Pitch randomize ±5% for variation.

distant_thunder.name: Distant Thunder - Light Rain - Nocturnal Insects 19 Minutes.wav

ue5_usage.notes: Low-volume background layer under primary ambience. Adds depth and distance. Insects create biological authenticity.
Close rain hits — use for shelter interior vs exterior blend. Higher volume when player is exposed, lower when sheltered.

metasound_blueprint_spec.name: MS_StormyNight_Ambience
graph_description: StormIntensity → modulates primary ambience volume (0.5 to 1.0 range)
StormIntensity → modulates fog density via Blueprint event
PlayerSheltered → crossfade between close rain (outdoor) and muffled rain (indoor)
LightningFlashTrigger → one-shot thunder accent with random delay and pitch variation
All layers mixed through MetaSound submix with reverb tail 2.5s

lightning_flash_sequence.description: Synchronized lightning flash + thunder for maximum impact
steps: 1. Blueprint timer fires random interval (8-45 seconds)
5. Thunder sound plays after random delay 0-2500ms

agent_16_handoff.action_required: Import Freesound assets, create MS_StormyNight_Ambience MetaSound, implement lightning flash Blueprint
